title: Deep Learning for Medical Imaging Accepted at IEEE TMI
description: Our paper on hybrid intelligence systems for medical image segmentation has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Image Analysis.

title: Presenting at ICCV 2026
description: Excited to present our latest work on computer vision at the International Conference on Computer Vision in Paris.

title: New Research Collaboration
description: Started a new collaboration with researchers at Beijing Institute of Technology on real-time activity recognition systems.

title: h-index Reaches 12
description: Our research portfolio continues to grow with 45+ citations across multiple publications in computer vision and AI.

title: Open Source: ViT-Med Framework
description: Released an open-source PyTorch framework for Vision Transformers in medical imaging on GitHub.

title: Best Paper Award
description: Awarded the Best Paper Award at the AI for Healthcare Systems Conference for our work on model interpretability.
